drafts.qrt_text: The $USA token from Trump is coming to Bybit. Bybit listing = more retail access = more volume. The meme coin arms race continues.
Biggest DeFi exploit of 2026: Drift Protocol lost $270M-$285M on April 1. Not a smart contract bug — sophisticated social engineering attack. The saga continues.
Solana processed 10.1B transactions in Q1 2026 — first time ever. ETH did 200M in same period. 50x more activity.
BTC holds ~12% of supply, ETH L1 fees down 85%, SOL stablecoins up 186%. The narrative is shifting fast.
Agents will be your primary customer within 24 months. Alchemy AgentPay opens up agent payments for everyone — x402, MPP support. The agent economy is coming.

AgentCard pivots to physical gold for agents. Integration with @agentmail coming soon so your agents can send each other physical gold in the mail. Finally unlocking the payment rails your agent never knew it needed.
Building something new. Prev: founder @heymintxyz (acq by @alchemy). Mai's journey from engineer to founder to acquisition and building again.
